title: bupleurum ranunculoides subsp. caricinum
intro: Bupleurum ranunculoides subsp. caricinum, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bupleurum ranunculoides subsp. caricinum include reducing fever, alleviating liver and kidney problems, and improving immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or decoction for its therapeutic effects, and is also used in herbal combinations to enhance its benefits.
